subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Hearken unto the Call of the Most Great from this manifest horizon: verily, there is no God but Him, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم ان استمع ندآء العظیم من هذا الافق المبین انه لا اله الا هو الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
